note: Auto-generated from packages/react/src by scripts/build-manifest.mjs. Components render inside a themed `.vsp-root` element and consume @vespera-ui/css classes. Icon props accept any ReactNode (use @vespera-ui/icons).

props.name: multiple
props.description: Allow multiple panels open at once.

props.name: onOpenChange
props.description: Notified with the next set of open indices whenever a panel toggles.

props.name: open
props.description: Controlled open indices. Omit for uncontrolled (the default).

props.name: icon
props.description: Override the default tone icon.

components.name: Anchored
components.description: Positioning base for menus and popovers: anchors a portaled layer to a trigger.

props.name: onOpenChange
props.description: Notified whenever the open state should change (both modes).

props.name: open
props.description: Controlled open state. Omit for uncontrolled (the default).

props.name: alt
props.description: Alt text for the image (defaults to `name`).

props.name: hue
props.description: Hue (0–360) for the generated gradient (used when there's no `src`).

props.name: src
props.description: Image URL — falls back to initials if omitted.

props.name: status
props.description: Presence indicator dot.

props.name: colors
props.description: Per-series colors (overrides the default palette).

props.name: data
props.description: One series (`number[]`) or several (`number[][]`).

props.name: horizontal
props.description: Lay bars left-to-right instead of bottom-up.

props.name: seriesLabels
props.description: Series names — when given (and multi-series) a legend is shown.

props.name: showValues
props.description: Print each value on its bar.

props.name: stacked
props.description: Stack series within each category instead of grouping side-by-side.

props.name: valueFormat
props.description: Format values for the tooltip + value labels.

components.name: Block
components.description: A titled section wrapping its content in a Vespera `card`.

props.name: desc
props.description: Optional sub-heading under the title.

props.name: title
props.description: Optional heading shown above the card.

props.name: maxItems
props.description: Collapse the middle into an ellipsis when there are more than this many.

props.name: fullWidth
props.description: Stretch to the full width of the container.

props.name: loadingText
props.description: Label shown while `loading` (keeps the button's width stable).

components.name: Calendar
components.description: The month grid. Usually used via `DatePicker` / `DateRangePicker`.

props.name: isDisabled
props.description: Mark a day non-selectable (greyed, struck-through).

props.name: min
props.description: Earliest / latest navigable + selectable day.

props.name: pad
props.description: Apply the standard content padding.

props.name: indeterminate
props.description: Tri-state "partially checked" look (e.g. a select-all header).

props.name: invalid
props.description: Red outline for form validation.

props.name: creatable
props.description: Offer a "Create …" row for the typed query when it matches nothing.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disable the control.

props.name: emptyText
props.description: Message when there are no options/matches.

props.name: id
props.description: For a `<label htmlFor>` association.

props.name: invalid
props.description: Mark invalid (red border) for form validation.

props.name: loading
props.description: Show a loading state in the list (e.g. while fetching async options).

props.name: name
props.description: Submits the selected value under this name in a form.

props.name: onCreate
props.description: Called with the typed text when the create row is chosen.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Days that can't be picked — see {@link DateMatcher}.

props.name: min
props.description: Earliest / latest selectable day.

props.name: multiple
props.description: Select several days instead of one. Drives `values` / `onValuesChange`.

props.name: value
props.description: Selected day (single mode).

props.name: values
props.description: Selected days (multiple mode).

props.name: disabled
props.description: Days that can't be picked — see {@link DateMatcher}.

props.name: min
props.description: Earliest / latest selectable day.

props.name: minNights
props.description: Minimum / maximum length of the range, in nights.

props.name: presets
props.description: Shortcut ranges shown in a rail beside the calendar.

props.name: closeOnEsc
props.description: Close when Escape is pressed (default true).

props.name: closeOnOverlayClick
props.description: Close when the backdrop is clicked (default true).

props.name: centerLabel
props.description: Content rendered in the hole (e.g. a total). Replaced by the hovered slice's detail on hover.

props.name: valueFormat
props.description: Format the value shown in the hover detail.

components.name: EventCalendar
components.description:
A month / week / agenda calendar with click-and-drag day selection and an
inline "new event" dialog. Events are kept in local state; `onChange` reports
every change so a host can persist them.
